# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Dependency Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop, 'feature/**']
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        default: 'development'
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  setup-and-cache:
    name: Setup Dependencies & Cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      node-cache-hit: ${{ steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
      pip-cache-hit: ${{ steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
      config-cache-hit: ${{ steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}
      environment: ${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Determine environment
        id: set-env
        run: |
          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]; then
            echo "environment=${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [ "${{ github.ref }}" == "refs/heads/main" ]; then
            echo "environment=production" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          elif [ "${{ github.ref }}" == "refs/heads/develop" ]; then
            echo "environment=staging" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "environment=development" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: node-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        id: pip-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache environment-specific configuration files
        id: config-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            config/
            .env.${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            webpack.config*
            .pylintrc
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            mypy.ini
            tox.ini
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig*.json', '.pylintrc', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        id: build-cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            .next/
            __pycache__/
            *.egg-info/
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}-

      - name: Install Node.js dependencies
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then
            npm install -g pnpm
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f "yarn.lock" ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
            npm ci
          elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            npm install
          else
            echo "No Node.js package manifest found. Skipping Node.js dependency installation."
          fi

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m venv .venv || true
          source .venv/bin/activate || true
          pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
          if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "requirements-dev.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "requirements-${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}.txt" ]; then
            pip install -r requirements-${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}.txt
          fi
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            pip install -e ".[dev]" || pip install -e . || true
          fi
          if [ -f "Pipfile" ]; then
            pip install pipenv
            pipenv install --dev
          fi

      - name: Generate environment-specific config
        run: |
          ENV="${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}"
          mkdir -p config

          cat > config/env-config.json << EOF
          {
            "environment": "${ENV}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "node_version": "${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}",
            "python_version": "${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}",
            "git_sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "git_ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
            "cache_version": "${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}"
          }
          EOF

          if [ ! -f ".env.${ENV}" ]; then
            cat > .env.${ENV} << EOF
          NODE_ENV=${ENV}
          APP_ENV=${ENV}
          LOG_LEVEL=$([ "${ENV}" = "production" ] && echo "error" || echo "debug")
          DEBUG=$([ "${ENV}" = "production" ] && echo "false" || echo "true")
          API_BASE_URL=$([ "${ENV}" = "production" ] && echo "https://api.example.com" || echo "https://api.${ENV}.example.com")
          EOF
          fi

          echo "Generated configuration for environment: ${ENV}"
          cat config/env-config.json

      - name: Verify cached artifacts
        run: |
          echo "=== Cache Status Summary ==="
          echo "Node modules cache hit: ${{ steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Pip packages cache hit: ${{ steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Config cache hit: ${{ steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Build cache hit: ${{ steps.build-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Target environment: ${{ steps.set-env.outputs.environment }}"
          echo ""
          echo "=== Cached Directory Sizes ==="
          du -sh node_modules 2>/dev/null || echo "node_modules: not found"
          du -sh ~/.npm 2>/dev/null || echo "~/.npm: not found"
          du -sh ~/.cache/pip 2>/dev/null || echo "~/.cache/pip: not found"
          du -sh .venv 2>/dev/null || echo ".venv: not found"
          du -sh config 2>/dev/null || echo "config: not found"
          du -sh dist 2>/dev/null || echo "dist: not found"
          du -sh build 2>/dev/null || echo "build: not found"

  lint-and-format:
    name: Lint & Format Check
    needs: setup-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore config cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            config/
            .env.${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            webpack.config*
            .pylintrc
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            mypy.ini
            tox.ini
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig*.json', '.pylintrc', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Run Node.js linting
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            npx eslint . --ext .js,.jsx,.ts,.tsx --max-warnings 0 2>/dev/null || echo "ESLint not configured or no matching files"
            npx prettier --check "**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,json,md,yml,yaml}" 2>/dev/null || echo "Prettier not configured or no matching files"
          fi

      - name: Run Python linting
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true
          if command -v flake8 &> /dev/null; then
            flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics || true
            flake8 . --count --exit-zero --max-complexity=10 --max-line-length=127 --statistics || true
          fi
          if command -v black &> /dev/null; then
            black --check . || true
          fi
          if command -v isort &> /dev/null; then
            isort --check-only . || true
          fi
          if command -v mypy &> /dev/null; then
            mypy . --ignore-missing-imports || true
          fi

  test:
    name: Run Tests (${{ matrix.test-type }})
    needs: setup-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        test-type: [node, python]

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: matrix.test-type == 'node'
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: matrix.test-type == 'python'
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        if: matrix.test-type == 'node'
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore pip cache
        if: matrix.test-type == 'python'
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore config cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            config/
            .env.${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            webpack.config*
            .pylintrc
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            mypy.ini
            tox.ini
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig*.json', '.pylintrc', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Run Node.js tests
        if: matrix.test-type == 'node'
        env:
          NODE_ENV: test
          CI: true
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            ENV="${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}"
            if [ -f ".env.${ENV}" ]; then
              set -a
              source .env.${ENV}
              set +a
            fi
            npx jest --coverage --ci --reporters=default 2>/dev/null || \
            npm test 2>/dev/null || \
            echo "No Node.js tests configured"
          fi

      - name: Run Python tests
        if: matrix.test-type == 'python'
        env:
          PYTHONPATH: .
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true
          ENV="${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}"
          if [ -f ".env.${ENV}" ]; then
            set -a
            source .env.${ENV}
            set +a
          fi
          if command -v pytest &> /dev/null; then
            pytest --tb=short --cov=. --cov-report=xml --cov-report=term-missing -v || true
          elif [ -f "manage.py" ]; then
            python manage.py test || true
          else
            python -m unittest discover -s tests -v 2>/dev/null || echo "No Python tests found"
          fi

      - name: Upload test coverage
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-${{ matrix.test-type }}
          path: |
            coverage/
            htmlcov/
            coverage.xml
            .coverage
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  build:
    name: Build Application
    needs: [setup-and-cache, lint-and-format, test]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py', '**/pyproject.toml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore config cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            config/
            .env.${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig*.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            webpack.config*
            .pylintrc
            pyproject.toml
            setup.cfg
            mypy.ini
            tox.ini
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*', '.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig*.json', '.pylintrc', 'pyproject.toml', 'setup.cfg') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Restore build cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            .next/
            __pycache__/
            *.egg-info/
          key: ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}-

      - name: Build Node.js application
        env:
          NODE_ENV: ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            ENV="${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}"
            if [ -f ".env.${ENV}" ]; then
              set -a
              source .env.${ENV}
              set +a
            fi
            npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo "No build script found in package.json"
          fi

      - name: Build Python application
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true
          if [ -f "setup.py" ]; then
            python setup.py build || true
          fi
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            pip install build 2>/dev/null || true
            python -m build 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            .next/
          retention-days: 14
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Build summary
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Property | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|----------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Environment | ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.environment }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Node.js | ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Python | ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Node Cache Hit | ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.node-cache-hit }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Pip Cache Hit | ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.pip-cache-hit }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Config Cache Hit | ${{ needs.setup-and-cache.outputs.config-cache-hit }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Commit | ${{ github.sha }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Branch | ${{ github.ref_name }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
